title: Memory Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Memory.jpg|right|400px]]

==Summary==
'''The ability to influence memory.''' Can be carried out using [[Empathy Manipulation|empathic]], [[Mind Manipulation|mental]], [[Biological Manipulation|biological]], [[Elemental Manipulation|electrical]] or [[Information Manipulation|data]] manipulation. Furthermore the memory can be comprehended and controlled in other ways (e.g., by [[Magic|magic]]).

==Possible Mechanisms==
*'''[[Empathic Manipulation|Empathic manipulation]]:''' Affecting memory through emotions. Usually very limited and allows user to erase or distort existing memories only.
*'''[[Mind Manipulation|Mental manipulation]]:''' Affecting memory through the consciousness/mind. Allows managing memory in a variety of ways, comprehending, modifying, deleting existing memories, as well as creating new memories.
*'''[[Biological Manipulation|Biochemical manipulation]]:''' Affecting memory through brain cells, making it possible to manage memory. This may also include modification of memory by controlling the electrochemical signals of the brain.
*'''[[Information Manipulation|Information manipulation]]:''' In this case, the memory acts as a regular array of information. It can be accessed in a manner similar to accessing the hard drive of a computer.

==Users==

*[[Bill Cipher]] ([[Gravity Falls]])
